name: 朝堂（權力博弈場）
description: 朝堂是皇帝宣布重大決定的場所——封太子、遣散後宮、揭露秘密，每次朝堂戲都是劇情高潮的爆發點。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: I believe that the young prince is your only imperial heir and also a true dragon reborn. He is a lucky star for our calidor and should be named the crown prince.
examples.context: 朝堂是皇帝宣布重大決定的場所——封太子、遣散後宮、揭露秘密，每次朝堂戲都是劇情高潮的爆發點。
